scripts.prisma:seed:admin: tsc prisma/seed-admin.ts --outDir dist/prisma --module CommonJS --moduleResolution Node --target ES2022 --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck && node dist/prisma/seed-admin.js
scripts.prisma:seed:demo: tsc prisma/seed-demo.ts --outDir dist/prisma --module CommonJS --moduleResolution Node --target ES2022 --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck && node dist/prisma/seed-demo.js
scripts.prisma:seed:corp: nest build && tsc prisma/seed-corp-demo.ts --outDir dist/prisma --module CommonJS --moduleResolution Node --target ES2022 --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck && node dist/prisma/seed-corp-demo.js
scripts.report:clinic-assignments: tsc prisma/report-clinic-assignments.ts --outDir dist/prisma --module CommonJS --moduleResolution Node --target ES2022 --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck && node dist/prisma/report-clinic-assignments.js
